<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `C:\Users\downl\Desktop\hermes-agent-main\hermes-agent-main\tools\registry.py`

```text
1	"""Central registry for all hermes-agent tools.
2	
3	Each tool file calls ``registry.register()`` at module level to declare its
4	schema, handler, toolset membership, and availability check.  ``model_tools.py``
5	queries the registry instead of maintaining its own parallel data structures.
6	
7	Import chain (circular-import safe):
8	    tools/registry.py  (no imports from model_tools or tool files)
9	           ^
10	    tools/*.py  (import from tools.registry at module level)
11	           ^
12	    model_tools.py  (imports tools.registry + all tool modules)
13	           ^
14	    run_agent.py, cli.py, batch_runner.py, etc.
15	"""
16	
17	import json
18	import logging
19	from typing import Callable, Dict, List, Optional, Set
20	
21	logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
22	
23	
24	class ToolEntry:
25	    """Metadata for a single registered tool."""
26	
27	    __slots__ = (
28	        "name", "toolset", "schema", "handler", "check_fn",
29	        "requires_env", "is_async", "description", "emoji",
30	    )
31	
32	    def __init__(self, name, toolset, schema, handler, check_fn,
33	                 requires_env, is_async, description, emoji):
34	        self.name = name
35	        self.toolset = toolset
36	        self.schema = schema
37	        self.handler = handler
38	        self.check_fn = check_fn
39	        self.requires_env = requires_env
40	        self.is_async = is_async
41	        self.description = description
42	        self.emoji = emoji
43	
44	
45	class ToolRegistry:
46	    """Singleton registry that collects tool schemas + handlers from tool files."""
47	
48	    def __init__(self):
49	        self._tools: Dict[str, ToolEntry] = {}
50	        self._toolset_checks: Dict[str, Callable] = {}
51	
52	    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
53	    # Registration
54	    # ------------------------------------------------------------------
55	
56	    def register(
57	        self,
58	        name: str,
59	        toolset: str,
60	        schema: dict,
61	        handler: Callable,
62	        check_fn: Callable = None,
63	        requires_env: list = None,
64	        is_async: bool = False,
65	        description: str = "",
66	        emoji: str = "",
67	    ):
68	        """Register a tool.  Called at module-import time by each tool file."""
69	        existing = self._tools.get(name)
70	        if existing and existing.toolset != toolset:
71	            logger.warning(
72	                "Tool name collision: '%s' (toolset '%s') is being "
73	                "overwritten by toolset '%s'",
74	                name, existing.toolset, toolset,
75	            )
76	        self._tools[name] = ToolEntry(
77	            name=name,
78	            toolset=toolset,
79	            schema=schema,
80	            handler=handler,
81	            check_fn=check_fn,
82	            requires_env=requires_env or [],
83	            is_async=is_async,
84	            description=description or schema.get("description", ""),
85	            emoji=emoji,
86	        )
87	        if check_fn and toolset not in self._toolset_checks:
88	            self._toolset_checks[toolset] = check_fn
89	
90	    def deregister(self, name: str) -> None:
91	        """Remove a tool from the registry.
92	
93	        Also cleans up the toolset check if no other tools remain in the
94	        same toolset.  Used by MCP dynamic tool discovery to nuke-and-repave
95	        when a server sends ``notifications/tools/list_changed``.
96	        """
97	        entry = self._tools.pop(name, None)
98	        if entry is None:
99	            return
100	        # Drop the toolset check if this was the last tool in that toolset
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
1	#!/usr/bin/env python3
2	"""
3	Text-to-Speech Tool Module
4	
5	Supports four TTS providers:
6	- Edge TTS (default, free, no API key): Microsoft Edge neural voices
7	- ElevenLabs (premium): High-quality voices, needs ELEVENLABS_API_KEY
8	- OpenAI TTS: Good quality, needs OPENAI_API_KEY
9	- NeuTTS (local, free, no API key): On-device TTS via neutts_cli, needs neutts installed
10	
11	Output formats:
12	- Opus (.ogg) for Telegram voice bubbles (requires ffmpeg for Edge TTS)
13	- MP3 (.mp3) for everything else (CLI, Discord, WhatsApp)
14	
15	Configuration is loaded from ~/.hermes/config.yaml under the 'tts:' key.
16	The user chooses the provider and voice; the model just sends text.
17	
18	Usage:
19	    from tools.tts_tool import text_to_speech_tool, check_tts_requirements
20	
21	    result = text_to_speech_tool(text="Hello world")
22	"""
23	
24	import asyncio
25	import datetime
26	import json
27	import logging
28	import os
29	import queue
30	import re
31	import shutil
32	import subprocess
33	import tempfile
34	import threading
35	from pathlib import Path
36	from hermes_constants import get_hermes_home
37	from typing import Callable, Dict, Any, Optional
38	
39	logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
40	
41	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
42	# Lazy imports -- providers are imported only when actually used to avoid
43	# crashing in headless environments (SSH, Docker, WSL, no PortAudio).
44	# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
45	
46	def _import_edge_tts():
47	    """Lazy import edge_tts. Returns the module or raises ImportError."""
48	    import edge_tts
49	    return edge_tts
50	
51	def _import_elevenlabs():
52	    """Lazy import ElevenLabs client. Returns the class or raises ImportError."""
53	    from elevenlabs.client import ElevenLabs
54	    return ElevenLabs
55	
56	def _import_openai_client():
57	    """Lazy import OpenAI client. Returns the class or raises ImportError."""
58	    from openai import OpenAI as OpenAIClient
59	    return OpenAIClient
60	
61	def _import_sounddevice():
62	    """Lazy import sounddevice. Returns the module or raises ImportError/OSError."""
63	    import sounddevice as sd
64	    return sd
65	
66	
67	# ===========================================================================
68	# Defaults
69	# ===========================================================================
70	DEFAULT_PROVIDER = "edge"
71	DEFAULT_EDGE_VOICE = "en-US-AriaNeural"
72	DEFAULT_ELEVENLABS_VOICE_ID = "pNInz6obpgDQGcFmaJgB"  # Adam
73	DEFAULT_ELEVENLABS_MODEL_ID = "eleven_multilingual_v2"
74	DEFAULT_ELEVENLABS_STREAMING_MODEL_ID = "eleven_flash_v2_5"
75	DEFAULT_OPENAI_MODEL = "gpt-4o-mini-tts"
76	DEFAULT_OPENAI_VOICE = "alloy"
77	def _get_default_output_dir() -> str:
78	    from hermes_constants import get_hermes_dir
79	    return str(get_hermes_dir("cache/audio", "audio_cache"))
80
```

# ===========================================================================
if __name__ == "__main__":
    print("🔊 Text-to-Speech Tool Module")
    print("=" * 50)

    def _check(importer, label):
        try:
            importer()
            return True
        except ImportError:
            return False

    print("\nProvider availability:")
    print(f"  Edge TTS:   {'installed' if _check(_import_edge_tts, 'edge') else 'not installed (pip install edge-tts)'}")
    print(f"  ElevenLabs: {'installed' if _check(_import_elevenlabs, 'el') else 'not installed (pip install elevenlabs)'}")
    print(f"    API Key:  {'set' if os.getenv('ELEVENLABS_API_KEY') else 'not set'}")
    print(f"  OpenAI:     {'installed' if _check(_import_openai_client, 'oai') else 'not installed'}")
    print(f"    API Key:  {'set' if os.getenv('VOICE_TOOLS_OPENAI_KEY') else 'not set (VOICE_TOOLS_OPENAI_KEY)'}")
    print(f"  ffmpeg:     {'✅ found' if _has_ffmpeg() else '❌ not found (needed for Telegram Opus)'}")
    print(f"\n  Output dir: {DEFAULT_OUTPUT_DIR}")

    config = _load_tts_config()
    provider = _get_provider(config)
    print(f"  Configured provider: {provider}")


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Registry
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
from tools.registry import registry

TTS_SCHEMA = {
    "name": "text_to_speech",
    "description": "Convert text to speech audio. Returns a MEDIA: path that the platform delivers as a voice message. On Telegram it plays as a voice bubble, on Discord/WhatsApp as an audio attachment. In CLI mode, saves to ~/voice-memos/. Voice and provider are user-configured, not model-selected.",
    "parameters": {
        "type": "object",
        "properties": {
            "text": {
                "type": "string",
                "description": "The text to convert to speech. Keep under 4000 characters."
            },
            "output_path": {
                "type": "string",
                "description": "Optional custom file path to save the audio. Defaults to ~/.hermes/audio_cache/<timestamp>.mp3"
            }
        },
        "required": ["text"]
    }
}

registry.register(
    name="text_to_speech",
    toolset="tts",
    schema=TTS_SCHEMA,
    handler=lambda args, **kw: text_to_speech_tool(
        text=args.get("text", ""),
        output_path=args.get("output_path")),
    check_fn=check_tts_requirements,
    emoji="🔊",
)

_**Agent (claude-sonnet-4-6 2026-03-31 18:27:39Z)**_

完了しました（コミット `8dcfabb2`）。

## 実装内容

AIエージェントが自律的にツールを呼び出せるようになりました。

### 利用できるようになったツール（8個）

| ツール名 | 動作 |
|---|---|
| `vrchat_chatbox` | VRChatのチャットボックスにメッセージ送信 |
| `vrchat_typing` | タイピングインジケーター表示/非表示 |
| `vrchat_avatar_param` | アバターOSCパラメーター設定（表情・ジェスチャー等） |
| `vrchat_send_osc` | 任意のOSCメッセージ送信 |
| `vrchat_status` | VRChat OSC疎通確認 |
| `voicevox_speak` | テキストをVOICEVOXで音声出力 |
| `voicevox_list_speakers` | スピーカー一覧表示 |
| `voicevox_status` | VOICEVOXエンジン確認 |

### 使い方

Hermesに自然言語で指示するだけで自律的に動きます：

```
「VRChatに挨拶メッセージを送って」
→ vrchat_chatboxを自動呼び出し

「VOICEVOXで『こんにちは』と読み上げて」
→ voicevox_speakを自動呼び出し

「VRChatのチャットボックスに送りながら同時に声でも読み上げて」
→ voicevox_speak + vrchat_chatbox を連続呼び出し
```

### 事前準備

```bash
# python-osc インストール（VRChat用）
uv pip install "hermes-agent[vrchat]"

# VRChat: Settings → OSC → Enable（ポート9000/9001）
# VOICEVOX: アプリを起動（ポート50021）
```
